title: Heltec V3 6LBR: testing and validation
description: Add tests for WiFi backhaul border router on Heltec V3: unit tests for prefix delegation, integration tests in mesh-sim or Renode with WiFi emulation (if possible), hardware test procedure in docs/bench-operations.md, interop with Rust lichen-gateway. Verify RPL root advertises correct prefix, bridging works for CoAP from mesh to upstream, status reflects backhaul. Use test vectors where applicable. Update build-t1000e.sh style scripts if needed for gateway. Close when CI/builds pass and manual WiFi test succeeds. Parent of project-LICHEN-sl32.
